name: uNeurai
description: Brings Neurai to embedded devices. Write your own hardware wallet, vending machine or any other neurai-powered device. Supports public and private keys, HD wallets, transactions, scripts and Neurai assets (issue, transfer and manage). Optional Post-Quantum support (ML-DSA-44, NIP-022) when built with -DUNEURAI_ENABLE_PQ and the mldsa-esp32 library installed alongside.
keywords: neurai, cryptography, xna, assets, post-quantum, ml-dsa
